name: Hotel Manager Simulator
short_description: You have been hired as a hotel manager. Now it is the time to prove yourself that you can bring benefits to the hotel while keeping hotel customers happy as much as possible by satisfying their appropriate needs. Good luck, fellows!
detailed_description:
Hotel Manager Simulator lets you step into the daily life of a hotel manager and experience the journey of building and running your own hotel.

Recently reworked, the game continues to grow with improvements and updates, bringing a refreshed experience while staying true to its original charm.

During the game, you will be able to experience many parts of a hotel manager’s daily life, including:

  • Develop and expand your hotel 🛠

  • Arrange rooms for guests 🏨

  • Talk with guests and learn their stories 💭

  • Deal with different events and unexpected situations 📋

  • Manage your hotel’s cash flow and operations 💰

Hotel life is never boring...

Some guests may have unusual personalities, strange requests, or unexpected things to say. The way you interact with them can affect your hotel’s status and may even influence how the game ends. There is plenty to explore through your interactions with NPCs and the choices you make along the way.

With relaxing music and a cozy atmosphere, Hotel Manager Simulator aims to provide a pleasant and immersive experience.

As the game has recently been reworked, player thoughts, feedback, and suggestions are always welcome. Your support and ideas can help shape the future of the game.

Long live the great hotel!
